change_summary: Recorded a reproducible post-entry sector-relative breakdown taxonomy and winner-collateral estimate without changing strategy behavior.
hypothesis: Accepted-stack bad trades may contain a reproducible post-entry sector-relative breakdown family distinct from low-MFE, overnight gap-down, near-target giveback, and price-only early adverse excursion audits.
notes: Artifact: docs/experiments/artifacts/exp_20260426_058_sector_relative_breakdown_audit.json. Sector breakdown bad trades: 7/66, -2282.02 PnL; winner collateral: 1 trade, +3156.91 PnL. Treat as observed-only; future test must add a second discriminator before any lifecycle action.

locked_variables: post-entry sector-relative breakdown taxonomy for accepted-stack trades
parameters.single_causal_variable: post-entry sector-relative breakdown taxonomy for accepted-stack trades
